question:
Will FMC's market close price on 2026-06-28 be higher than its market close price on 2026-06-21?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

Resolution criteria: Resolves to the market close price at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/FMC for the resolution date. If the resolution date coincides with a day the market is closed (weekend, holiday, etc.) the previous market close price is used.

Background: FMC Corporation, an agricultural sciences company, develops, markets, and sells crop protection chemicals in Latin America, North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia. The company offers crop protection chemicals, including insecticides, herbicides, and fungicides. It also provides biologicals, crop nutrition, and seed treatment products. It markets its products through its sales organization and alliance partners, independent distributors, and sales representatives. The company was founded in 1883 and is headquartered in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.

Background: FMC Corporation, an agricultural sciences company, develops, markets, and sells crop protection chemicals in Latin America, North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and Asia. The company offers crop protection chemicals, including insecticides, herbicides, and fungicides. It also provides biologicals, crop nutrition, and seed treatment products. It markets its products through its sales organization and alliance partners, independent distributors, and sales representatives. The company was founded in 1883 and is headquartered in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.

evidences.title: Crop Protection Chemicals Market | Global Market Analysis Report - 2036
evidences.content: Grains & cereals are projected to represent 40.0% of crop protection chemical demand in 2025, underscoring their critical role as the primary application channel for pest control across grain production, cereal farming operations, and staple crop applications. Grain farmers prefer crop protection chemicals for grains & cereals use for their exceptional protection characteristics, scalable application options, and ability to enhance crop yields while ensuring consistent protection quality throughout diverse grain platforms and farming operations. Positioned as essential protection components for modern grain production, crop protection chemical solutions offer both technological advantages and farming efficiency benefits. [...] The crop protection chemicals market was valued at USD 87.40 billion in 2025, projected to reach USD 91.42 billion in 2026, and is forecast to expand to USD 143.34 billion by 2036 at a 4.6% CAGR. Intensifying pest resistance cycles, expanding cultivated acreage in tropical and subtropical regions, and the progressive adoption of integrated pest management protocols that still rely on chemical actives as a baseline input are sustaining global consumption gr...

evidences.title: FMC Corporation Board of Directors appoints Pierre Brondeau chairman and chief executive officer
evidences.content: About FMCFMC Corporation is a global agricultural sciences company dedicated to helping growers produce food, feed, fiber and fuel for an expanding world population while adapting to a changing environment. FMC's innovative crop protection solutions – including biologicals, crop nutrition, digital and precision agriculture – enable growers, crop advisers and turf and pest management professionals to address their toughest challenges economically while protecting the environment. With approximately 6,200 employees at more than 100 sites worldwide, FMC is committed to discovering new herbicide, insecticide and fungicide active ingredients, product formulations and pioneering technologies that are consistently better for the planet. Visit fmc.com to learn more and follow us on LinkedIn®.
